7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
title: Писня про славного гетьмана запоризького Кишку Самійла
Text: Ой у лузи Базавлузи, тамъ бувъ куринь нетязськый,

song_id: 7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Тамъ жывъ-прожывавъ Кишка Самійло, гетьманъ козацькій.

song_id: 7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та коло себе сорокъ два чоловика нетягъ мавъ.

song_id: 7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То турецьке баша молоде паня по Чорному морю беспечьно гуляло,

song_id: 7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та ніякового соби дыва не выдало.

song_id: 7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та воны соби тамъ прыстань занималы,

song_id: 7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та въ у лузі Базавлузи гулялы,

song_id: 7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та Кишку Самійла, гетьмана козацького, нетязьського, зъ нетягами забыралы,

song_id: 7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Йимъ на рукы, на ногы надивалы,

song_id: 7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та въ кгаляру до турецького баши прыставлялы.

song_id: 7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То турецькій баша велику радисьть майе,

song_id: 7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Бо той йому добре дило зробывъ:

song_id: 7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Молоде баша турецьке паня по Чорному морю гуляйе,

song_id: 7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та на бидныхъ невольныкивъ козакивъ-нетягъ гьризно гукало,

song_id: 7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та въ виру невирну турецьку повертало

song_id: 7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: «Ой вы бидьни невольныкы, свою виру залышайте,

song_id: 7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та до нашойи виры велыкойи прыставайте.

song_id: 7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та до свого товарыства словамы промовляйе,

song_id: 7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та свою виру хрысьтіяньську на лакомства нешьчасьни не проминяйе»,

song_id: 7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та до нашойи виры будуть прывертаты».

song_id: 7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Йа слугы свойи Ляхъ-потурнакъ ставъ гукаты:

song_id: 7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: «Кажу я вамъ, турки-янычары! На нызъ исхожайте,

song_id: 7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Терныны колючойи, иволгы чорьнойи у рукы набырайте,

song_id: 7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та до невильныкивъ на гребна схожайте,

song_id: 7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Б-бы-йте до-бре, шкуру зъ мнясомъ вытынайте,

song_id: 7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: По тры разы въ одно мисто затынайте».

song_id: 7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Терныну колючу завьялену у рукы забыралы,

song_id: 7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та до бидных невольныкивъ на гребни схожалы,

song_id: 7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Биле тило козацьке-молодецьке по трычи въ одно мисто затыналы,

song_id: 7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Кровъ невынну, червону хрысьтіяньську на доливку проливалы.

song_id: 7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То бидьни невольныкы рукы вгору пидьнималы,

song_id: 7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та выведы насъ изъ неволи тяжкойи,

song_id: 7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А намъ на каторзи турецькій проклятій жытьтя не мыле.

song_id: 7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Визволь насъ, Господи, вьсихъ бидныхъ нешьчасныхъ невольныкивъ,

song_id: 7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та выведы жъ насъ исъ тяжкойи неволи!»

Text: До товарысьтва нызового славного запорозьського промовляйе:

Text: Выведе Винъ насъ изъ тяжкойи турецькойи каторгы-неволи,

song_id: 7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То вы, товарыство сллавне, запоро-зьське, добре дбайте!

Text: Та виры хрисьтійяньськойи, свого народу не забувайте».

Text: Шобъ не даты биднымъ козакамъ иншою голодною смертью помыраты.

Text: То воны тийи яства дорогійи не вжывалы,

7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Молоде баша въ суботу до дивкы Санджакивны прыбувало,

Text: А въ недилю до бидныхъ невольныкивъ пидслухаты ярызу посылало,

Text: Та само ву сьвитлыци камьяній гуляйе,

Text: До смерты буду тяжку муку и неволю прыйматы,

Text: Та буду козацьку голову въ земли хрысьтійяньській покладаты.

Text: Кишку Самійла пачє всихъ невольникивъ догьлядайе.

Text: То молоде баша до туркивъ-янычаривъ гукайе:

Text: «Э-й, Кишка Самійло! Свойему сердцеви тугы не завдавай,

7.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та въ у Чорне море мойе тило покыдавъ».

7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Галеру свою на берези зъ невольникамы оставляло,

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Само до дивкы Санджакивны у сьвитлыцю прихожало,

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Исъ свойимы турками-янычарамы пыло та гуляло,

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А въ галери триста чоловикъ невольныкивъ оставляло,

7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Шо винъ якъ проснувся, такъ чуть не сказывься.

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: «Хто бъ мигъ бы мини мій сонъ страшный одгадаты?

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Я бъ мигъ бы йому велыку награду даты.

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А съ козакивъ бы хто одгадавъ, –

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Я бъ йиму зразу вызволенного лыста напысавъ,

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Шобъ його нихто ниде не займавъ».

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Снылось мини неначе мене Самійло Кишка на тры части ростявъ

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А Самійлови козакы усихъ мойихъ туркивъ порубалы

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: «Ты цього сну не страшыся! Хай цей сонъ мымо проходе,

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Хай коло невольныкивъ клюшныкъ ляхъ Потурнакъ получче ходе.

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Дозволь мини до невольныкивъ дужьчє доглядаты

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: ЬІ часьтише неволныкивъ по шыяхъ тавологою затинаты,

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А Самійла Кишку ланьцюгомъ ажъ утройе прымотаты».

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Тоди приказавъ йиму Алканъ-паша стари кайданы зъ неволныкивъ позьниматы

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А Трапезоньській баша у дивкы Санджакивны беспечно пта гулявъ,

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А объ соби ничого й не знавъ.

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И на галери клюшныка не забувавъ,

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Туда йиму напыткивъ и найидкивъ передававъ.

7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: ЬІ кьлючи въ клюшныка коло пояса отчипавъ,

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Шобъ, бува, йихъ туркы не побылы,

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: На кожному невблныкови нови кайданы забачалы,

7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Усихъ неволныкивъ у нови кайданы закувавъ,

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А на себе лыхойи годыны не дожыдавъ.

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Шобъ кажынъ бизъ брязку кайданы въ море повкыдавъ.

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: ЬІ йа выбиръ соби булатьни шабли выбыралы,

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Тикы съ собою Ляха Потурнака жывого оставлялы.

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Клюшныкъ йимъ прыказавъ, шобъ блызько воны свойи галеры до цийи галеры не допускалы.

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Туркы пытають: «А де жъ винъ йе?»

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: «Спля-ть у покояхъ! У дивкы Сайджакивны гулялы

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И велилы намъ, шоб мы блызько другойи галеры не допускалы,

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Тоди козакы свою галеру швыдко гналы

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: ЬІ съ гарматъ на йихъ стрилялы,

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Бо воны свойихъ козакивъ не пизнавалы,

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Покы козакы йимъ свойейи хрещатойи корогвы не показалы.

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И на берегъ все турецьке добро выгружалы,

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Срибло й злото мижъ собойю пайювалы,

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Шо прийшлось черезъ трыдьцять литъ зъ неволи у Сичъ-матиръ прыбуты

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Слава Самійлу Кишци не вмре, не поляже,

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Отныни й довику. Всьому мыру хрыстіяньському росскаже.

song_id: 7.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
title: Пирятинській Попович Алексѣй

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Что на Чорномъ море не добре починаетъ:

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: На святомъ небѣ всѣ звезды помрачило,

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Изъ чистаго поля буень вѣтерь повѣваетъ,

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: На Черномъ море супротивну валечну филю изрываетъ...

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Козацкое судно на три части розбивало:

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Третію часть середъ Чорнаго моря потопило...

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: На той части потопаетъ триста пятьдесятъ козаковъ,

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Межъ ними безъ старшины козацкой не бывало,

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Только былъ одинъ старшій старшиною Грицко Зборовскій.

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А другой былъ старшиною Алексѣй Поповичъ Пирятинскій,

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Сталъ Грицко Зборовскій на чердакъ выхождати,

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Который межъ вами козакъ найбольшій грѣхъ соби мае,

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Може черезъ того наше судно козацкое потопае,

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Милосердному Богу, и Черному морю и всему выйску днѣпровому,

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И мнѣ, атаману кошевому, грѣхъ свой откывайте:

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Нехай вы будете одинъ въ море потопати,

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: За собою войска козацкаго, запорожскаго не занапащати!»

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Бо ни одинъ въ грѣхахъ не чували,

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Тылько обызвется одинъ Алексѣй Поповичъ пирятинскій,

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Изъ мого тугого лука шелковую тетиву изнимайте,

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та въ Черное море меня упустите:

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Нехай я буду въ Черномъ море потопати,

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: За собою выйска козацкаго не занапащати».

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Насъ, простыхъ людей, на все добре научаешъ:

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: На що соби великій такій грѣхъ уже маешъ?»

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И васъ, простыхъ людей, на все добре научаю,

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Я соби найбольшій всѣхъ васъ грѣхъ маю:

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Що я отъ отца своего, отъ паниматки изъ города Пирятина въ охотное войско выѣжжалъ,

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Я съ отцемъ и паниматкою прощенія не принималъ,

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Я отца своего и паниматку стременами въ груди отъ себя отпихалъ,

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Що я, панове, самъ не добре починалъ,

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: По городу Пирятину проѣзжалъ, дѣтокъ маленькихъ добрымъ конемъ розбивалъ:

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Отъ тѣмь мене Господь милосердный на великой потребѣ покаралъ».

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Алексѣя, Поповича пирятинского, на чердакъ выводите,

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Христіянскои крови въ Черное море впускайте:

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Якъ будетъ Черное море кровь христіянскую пожирати,

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То буде на Черномъ море супротивна валечна филя утихати».

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Алексѣя, Поповича пирятинского, на чердакъ выводили,

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Христіянскую кровъ въ Черное море впускали...

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Стало Черное море кровъ христіянскую пожирати,

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Стала на Чорномъ море супротивная валечная филя утихати,

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Стало судно козацкое, ниби руками, на берегъ выкидати,

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Стали козаки изъ судна на песокъ выходити,

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Стали въ четыре ряды на песку становити,

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Сталъ Алексѣй, Поповичъ пирятинскій, межъ всѣми

song_id: 8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Отца и матери молитва изо дна моря душу вынимае,

8.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Що на черному мори не добре ся починае.

song_id: 8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: «Хтось межъ нами, Панове! великій грихъ на соби мае,

song_id: 8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Щось дуже злая хуртовина на насъ налягае;

8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Чорному морю, и мени Атаману Кошовому.

8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Бо въ грихахъ себе не знавалы!

song_id: 8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Насъ, простыхъ людей на все добре наставляешъ,

song_id: 8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Защоты на соби великііій грихъ маешь?

song_id: 8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: О прощенья съ Панотцемъ, съ Паниматкою не бравъ,

song_id: 8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: За те я, Панове, великій грихъ маю

song_id: 8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То знавъ бы я отца, матерь повожаты

song_id: 8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И старшаго брата – и сестру ридненьку

song_id: 8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То якъ ставъ Поповичъ грихи сповидаты

song_id: 8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Судна козацьки догоры якъ рукамы поднимало,

song_id: 8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: - О тимъ би то, Панове, треба людей поважаты

song_id: 8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Панотцева, Паниматчина молитва со дна моря вынимае

song_id: 8.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
title: Черноморская буря
Text: На Чорному морѣ на бѣлому камнѣ

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Смутно себе мае, на Чорнее море спильна поглядае.

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Що на Чорному морю недобре ся починае,

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Що на небѣ усѣ звѣзды пошмарило,

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А изъ низу буйный вѣтеръ повѣвае,

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А по Чорному морю супротивна хвиля вставае,

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Судна козацьки на три части розбивае.

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Одну часть взяло – Въ землю Агарську занесло,

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А третя – где - ся мае? въ Чорному морю потопае.

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: При той части бувъ Грицько Зборовській

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Той по судну похожае, Словами промовляе:

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: «Хто-сь мижь нами, панове, великій грѣхъ на собѣ мае!

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Що-сь дуже злая хуртовина нась налягае.

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Чорному морю, и менѣ Отаману кошовому;

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То козаки тее зачували, усѣ замовчали,

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Бо въ грѣхахъ себе не знавали.

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Тольки обозвався Писарь Войськовый, козакъ лестровый,

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: «Добре вы, братця вчинѣте, мене самого возьмѣте,

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То да й у Чорнее море зопхнѣте!

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: «Ты-жъ святее письмо въ руки берешъ читаешъ

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Насъ, простыхъ людей, на все добре наставляешъ,

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Якъ же найбольше отъ насъ на собѣ грѣховъ маешъ?»

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Васъ простыхъ людей на все добре наставляю

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А я все самъ недобре починаю.

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Якъ я изъ города зъ Пирятина, панове, въѣзжавъ,

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Опрощенья зъ панъ-отцемъ и зъ пани-маткою не бравъ.

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И на свого старшого брата великій гнѣвъ покладавъ,

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И близькихъ сосѣдовъ хлѣюа-й-соли безневинно збавлявъ,

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Дѣти малыи, вдовы старыи стремнямъ въ груди товкавъ,

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Шапки зъ себе не знимавъ, хреста на себе не клавъ.

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: За те я, панове, великій гріхъ маю, теперь погибаю!

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Не есть се, панове, по Чорному морю хвиля вставае,

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А есть се – мене отцевська й материнська молитва карае!

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Колибъ мене сяя хуртовина злая въ морѣ не втопила,

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То знавъ бы я отця и матери шановати, поважати

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То знавъ бы я старшого брата за родного отця почитати,

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И сестру родненьку за неньку у себе мати!»

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То якъ ставъ поповичъ Олексѣй грѣхи свои сповѣдати,

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То стала злая хуртовина по Чорному морю стихати,

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Судна козацьки до-горы якъ руками подоймала,

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То всѣ  тогди козаки дивомъ дивовали,

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Що по якому Чорному морю, по быстрои хвилѣ потопали,

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А ни одного козака зъ-межы войська не втеряли! –

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Отъ-же тогди Олексѣй Поповичъ изъ судна выхожае,

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Бере святее письмо въ руки, читае,

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Усѣхъ простыхъ людей на все добре научае, до козаковъ промовляе:

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Отъ тымъ-бы то, панове, треба людей поважати,

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Отцева й матчина молитва зо дна моря выймае,

song_id: 8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.3_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: На полѣ й на морѣ на помочъ помагае!

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Ой близь Чорнаго моря, на каменю биленькому,

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Тамъ соколъ ясненькій жалобненько квилыть, проквиляе,

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: що на неби вси звизды поирачило,

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А половину мисяця въ хмары уступило,

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А изъ низу буйный витеръ повивае.

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А по Чорному морю супротивная фыля уставае,

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Судна бере козацьки, молодецьки, на три части розбивае,

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Посреди Чорного моря, на лыхій хортовини потопае.

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А при той части було війська много,

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А при той части бувъ Атоманъ Кошевій,

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Который козакъ не соби много гриховъ мае,

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То вси, по правди, вы, братця, свои грихи Богу сповидайте,

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Тилько бувъ при той части Оликсій Поповичъ Пырятиньскій,

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Сповидуюсь я попередъ по правди милосердному Богу!

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И билый камень до шіи причепите,

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Тай на Чорное море самого пустите.

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Хай же я буду самъ своею головою Чорне море даровати,

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А нижъ маю Козакивъ безневинно теряти.

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Ты жъ берешъ письмо святое, та въ руку читаешъ,

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И насъ, простыхъ людей, на все добре научаешъ,

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Якъ же ты найбильше видъ насъ на соби грихивъ маешъ?

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Хоча беру я святое письмо та въ руки, читаю,

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И васъ, простыхъ людей, на все добре научаю,

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А я все самъ не добре начинаю.

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Якъ я видъ города, видъ Пырятина, отъизжавъ,

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То зъ своимъ отцемъ и зъ маткою опрощенья не мавъ,

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И на свого старшого брата великій гнивъ покладавъ,

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И близкихъ сосидовъ хлиба и соли безневинно избавлявъ,

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Йще мимо церковъ ихавъ, мимо святого Миколая шапки не знявъ,

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Не есть се мене, Панове, по Чорному морю супротивная филя потопае,

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А есть се мене, Панове, отцевска, материнска молитва карае,

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Вси потребы въ добромъ здоровьи исхожати,

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То вже могъ бы я своего отца и матку шановаты, поважати,

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Могъ бы я свого старшого брата за ридна отца почитати,

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Могь бьі я близкихь сосидь за ридньїе братя вь себе мати,

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Оже то, якъ ставъ Олексій Поповичъ,

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Свои грихи по правди Богу сповидати,

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То стала быстрая филя по Чорному морю унимати,

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То вси три части до буйной пристани, до берега привертали,

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То вси тоди Козаки дивомъ дивовали,

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Що по якому Чорному морю, по быстрои фили потопали,

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А ни одного Козака съмижи виська не втеряли.

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Оже то тоди Оликсій Поповичъ на чуда выхожае,

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Бере святое письмо въ руки, читае,

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Всихъ простыхъ людей на все добре научае,

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Который человѣкъ отцеву матчину молитву чтить, шануе, поважае,

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Того отцева-матчина молитва въ купечестви, въ реместви,

song_id: 8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Отцева й матчина молитва со дна моря вынимае.

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
title: Про Олексія Поповича

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Смутно себе має, на Чорнеє море спильна поглядає,

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Що на Чорному морю недобре ся починає,

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Що на небі усі звізди потьмарило,

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А із низу буйний вітер повіває

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А по Чорному морю супротивна хвиля вставає,

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Судна козацькі на три часті розбиває.

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Одну часть узяло – в землю Огарску занесло,

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А третя – где ся має! - в Чорному морю потопає.

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: При тій часті був Грицько Зборовській,

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Той по судну похожає, словами промовляє:

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: «Хтось між нами, панове, великій гріх на собі має:

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Щось дуже злая хуртовина на нас налягає.

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Чорному морю, і мені, отаману кошовому,

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То козаки теє зачували, усі замовчали:

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Бо в гріхах себе не знавали.

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Тільки обізвався писарь військовий, козак лейстровий

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: «Добре ви, братця, вчиніте, мене самого візьміте,

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Да й у Чорнеє море зіпхніте!

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То козаки теє зачували, до Олексія поповича промовляли:

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: «Ти ж бо по трійчі письмо святеє у руки береш на день та й читаєш,

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Нас, простих козаків, на все добре наставляєш, -

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Чом ти гріхів більше на собі од усіх нас маєш?»

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: «Хоч я й по трійчі на день письмо святеє у руки беру та й читаю,

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Вас, козаків простих, на все добре наставляю,

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А я все сам не гаразд починаю;

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То ще більше гріхів од усіх вас на собі маю

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Як я із города Пирятина панове, виїжджав,

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Опрощення з пан-отцем із пані-маткою не брав,

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І на свого старшого брата великій гнів покладав,

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І близьких сусідів хліба-й-солі безневинно збавляв,

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Діти малиї топтав, вдови стариї стремнямъ у груди штовхав,

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та ще конем добрим по улиці вигравав,

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Шапки з себе не знімав, хреста на себе не клав.

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То ще я їхав селами і городами

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Може, думали та й гадали против мене що добре сказати,

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Да я й там за гордостю за пишностю противнитм словом одказав.

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Не питався: яка в вас церква святая?

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та питався: де в вас корчма новая,

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Чужі козаки по церквах молебні наймали,

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: От за те я, панове, великий гріх маю

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Не єсть се, панове, по Чорному морю хвиля вставає,

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А єсть се – мене отцевська і материнська молитва карає!

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Колиб мене сяя хуртовина злая въ морі не втопила.

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То знав би я отця й матір шановати-поважати,

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То знав би я зтаршого брата за рідного отця почитати

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І сестру рідненьку за неньку у себе мати!»

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То ще такого козака у море пускать пощадили;

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: На лівій руці мизинного пальця втинали,

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Его кровь у Чорнеє море метали.

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То скоро стало Чорнеє море кров християнську заживати,

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То стала злая хуртовина по Чорному морю стихати,

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Судна козацькі до-гори як руками підіймала,

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То всі тогді козаки дивом дивовали:

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: «Що в якому то страху ми бували,

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: На Чорному морю, на бистрої хвилі потопали,

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А ні одного козака з-межи війська не втеряли!»

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: От-же тогді Олексій попович із судна вихождає,

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Бере святеє письмо в руки, читає,

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Усіх простих козаків на все добре научає, до козаків промовляє:

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: «От-тим би то, панове, треба людей поважати,

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: По вік той счастє собі має,

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Отцева й матчина молитва зо дна моря виймає,

song_id: 8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.5_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: На полі й на морі на поміч помагає!»

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Що на Чорному морі не добре вже починає.

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То з неба дрібен дощик накрапає,

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: З Чорного моря хвилешна хвиля уставає,

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Там потопало три полки виська Дніпрового низового,

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То миждо ними був батько гетман старий Запорозький

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Що з давну козакив на Чорнеє море гуляти покличе.

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Вони в великих гріхах не чувалися.

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Нехай я буду у Чорному морю головою дарувати,

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Ніж маю я не по вині усе військо пікувати.

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Тижь бо й по трійчі письмо святе у руки береш на день, та й читаєш,

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Ти нас козаків простих на все добре научаєш.

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Чом ти гріхів більше на собі од усіх нас маєш?»

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Хочь я й по трійчі на день письмо святее у руки беру, та й читаю,

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Вас, козаків простих на все добре научаю,

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То ще більше грихів од усіх вас на собі маю.

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Що я з города з Пирятина виступав,

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Рідного брата за брата не мав,

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А близьких сусідів хліба і солі ізбавляв,

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та ще конем добрим по улиці гуляв,

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То ще я їхав мимо церкви, Святого Спаса,

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То за те мене Господб покарав,

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Злою хуртовиною з усим військом на Чорному морі подарував.

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То ще я їхав селами і городами,

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Може, вони к чому доброму думали і гадали;

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Не питався: яка в вас церква святая?

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та питався: де в вас корчма новая,

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: По церквах і манастирах служби одправляють,

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А я у корчмі пью, гуляю,

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І по том я, панове молодці, увесь гріх свій знаю.

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Ой моглаб мене, отцева паніматчина молитов на Чорному морі рятувати;

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Уже б я знав, як свою матір шанувати-поважати

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І рідного брата за брата пощитав би».

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То ще такого козака у море пускать пощадили;

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: На лівій руці мизинаго пальця втинали,

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Его кровь у Чорнеє море метали.

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То скоро Чорнеє море кров християнську заживало,

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А в Тендрі-острова три дні й три ночі стояли,

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Що в якому то страху ми бували,

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та ні одного козака ізмиж війська не втеряли.

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Ой той друг на чердак виступає,

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Письмо святеє в руки бере і читає,

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Чи ви видите, як се святеє писаніе свідчить висвідчає,

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Що котрий козак штить отця й матку шанує і поважає,

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То він нігде марно не пропадає:

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Его отцева й паніматчина молитов зо дна моря виімає,

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Хоч-би й у потребі – кривава ніч минає.

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А которий не штить отця й матки не поважає,

song_id: 8.6_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.7_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: На Чорному морѣ, на бѣлому камнѣ

song_id: 8.7_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Тамъ ясненькій сокилъ бѣлозорець квилить проквиляе,

song_id: 8.7_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: На небо поглядае, смутно себе мае,

song_id: 8.7_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Що на синему морѣ недобре щось починае:

song_id: 8.7_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.7_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.7_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А зъ низу буйный вѣтеръ повѣвае,

song_id: 8.7_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: По Чорному морю супротивну хвилю підіймае.

song_id: 8.7_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.7_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.7_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А третя середъ Чорного моря потопае.

song_id: 8.7_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: При той часті бувъ Грицько Коломыйченко,

song_id: 8.7_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.7_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.7_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Ставъ Грицько Коломыйченко на чердакъ вихожати,

song_id: 8.7_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.7_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Може, ктось межъ вами великій грѣх мае.

song_id: 8.7_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Що ся хуртовина на насъ налягае,

song_id: 8.7_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.7_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.7_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Чорному морю и всему войску Днѣпровому,

song_id: 8.7_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.7_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Нехай той, кто наибильше грѣхивь мае,

song_id: 8.7_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.7_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.7_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То якъ ставъ поповичъ Олексѣй грѣхи свои сповѣдати,

song_id: 8.7_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То стала злая хуртовина по Чорному морю стихати.

song_id: 8.7_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Судна козацьки до-горы якъ руками пидыймала,

song_id: 8.7_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.7_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.7_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Що по якому Чорному морю по бистрѣй хвилѣ потопали,

song_id: 8.7_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А нѣ одного козака зъ мѣжъ себе не втеряли!

song_id: 8.8_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: На Чорном мори, на білом камени

song_id: 8.8_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.8_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.8_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.8_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Що вже на Чорным мори не добре зачинає:

song_id: 8.8_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.8_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

Text: Билою сырыцею назад руки мынй извяжйте,

song_id: 8.8_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.8_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І живцем мене у море митайте,

song_id: 8.8_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.8_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

song_id: 8.8_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.8_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.8_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И больше ему страху не завдалы,

song_id: 8.8_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Всемогущои головки из плеч его не знималы,

song_id: 8.8_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.8_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

song_id: 8.8_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Як стало море в соби кров християнську зачуваты,

song_id: 8.8_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.8_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

8.8_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Так тогда й вси козакы дывом дывовалыся,

8.8_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

song_id: 8.8_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.8_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

song_id: 8.8_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

8.9_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Усімъ на здравіе, на многі літа мати!

8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: На святое небо та на Чорное море

song_id: 8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
