8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Судна козацке на три части розбивала:

song_id: 8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Другу часть въ Грапьску землю заносило,

song_id: 8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Третья часть по Чорному морю гуляе,

song_id: 8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Ни виткиль соби поряхунку не мае;

song_id: 8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То отъ винъ между врядвы хождае,

song_id: 8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Не хай я не буду больше

song_id: 8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Хоть я и письмо святое читаю,

song_id: 8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И васъ, простыхъ людей, близь себе научаю,

song_id: 8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А я больше зо всихъ васъ гриховъ маю.

song_id: 8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Отъ якъ я зъ города Пырятина выѣзжавъ,

song_id: 8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Старшого брата ни за що въ себе мавъ,

song_id: 8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Й близкого сосѣда ни за що въ себе мавъ,

song_id: 8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Кровь святу на святу землю проливавъ,

song_id: 8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А когда жъ мини хвыля не потопила,

song_id: 8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Когда мины отъ сего молитва ослобонила» –

song_id: 8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То тогда Олексій Поповичь между врядвы хождае,

song_id: 8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Крови хрестьянскей у Чорне море пустыте,

song_id: 8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А чай чи не буде въ Чорнем мори

song_id: 8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А чай чи не буде насъ

song_id: 8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И въ полѣ, и въ дому, и въ Чорномъ мори

song_id: 8.10_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: На синему морі, на білому камені

song_id: 8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Там сидів сокіл – смутно себе мав.

song_id: 8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Спильна на синєє море собі поглядав.

song_id: 8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Щось на синему морі недобре починає:

song_id: 8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Великая хуртовина на козацьке військо налягає;

song_id: 8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Одно судно загнала в Агараньску землю,

song_id: 8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: На третему судні Зборовскій Григорий отаман похожає,

song_id: 8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: «Ей, ви, козаки, сповідайтесь Богові и синему морю,

song_id: 8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І за що козацьке військо погибає?»

song_id: 8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Тогді обізвався Пирятинскій Олексій Попович; лейстровий козак:

song_id: 8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: «Як ви маєте, панове, козацькє військо тиряти,

song_id: 8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То лучче ви мені чорною китайкою очі завъяжіте,

song_id: 8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та білий камень до шиї привъяжіте,

song_id: 8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та мене одного в море зопхніте!»

song_id: 8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Потім до Пирятинскаго Олексія Поповича, лейстрового козака промовляли:

song_id: 8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Нас всіх на добрі діла навчаєш?»

song_id: 8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А я од вас більше гріхів маю;

song_id: 8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Бідних сусід з хліба, з солі збавляв,

song_id: 8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І просто церкви шапки не скидав;

song_id: 8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То у отца-неньки благословення не брав,

song_id: 8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: О, коли б же панове, ця злая хуртовина

song_id: 8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Мене на морі не втопила, не вдавила,

song_id: 8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Як се став Пирятинскій Олексій Попович лейстровий козак сповідати,

song_id: 8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І стало судно як руками до гори поднимати.

song_id: 8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І стало до Тин-дерева – острова прибивати.

song_id: 8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Тогді, як прибило до Тин-дерева острова,

song_id: 8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Бере Пирятинскій Олексій Попович, лейстровий козак святе письмо,

song_id: 8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: «Ой же то, панове, не треба людей з хліба з солі збавляти,

song_id: 8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Не треба буйно конем по вулиці проїзжати,

song_id: 8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Старим удовицям, малим дітям струмента в груди встромляти,

song_id: 8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І треба просто церкви шапку скидати,

song_id: 8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І куди виїзжати – як єсть ненька,

song_id: 8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.11_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А третя часть де ся має?

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Посеред Чорного моря, на бистрій хвилі на лихій хуртовині потопає.

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: При той часті було війська много;

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: При тій часті хто був старшиною?

8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І мене Оликсія Поповича, самого возьміте

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: До моєї шиї білий камень привъяжіте,

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Червоною китайкою очі мої козацькі-молодецькі запніте,

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Хай я сам буду своєю головою Чорнеє море дарувати,

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Ніж я маю много душ християнських безневинно на Чорнім морі погубляти».

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Ти святе письмо по тричі на день читаєш,

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Нас козаків на все добре научаєш;

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Про што ти найболш гріхів маєш»?

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Я святе письмо тричі на день читаю,

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І вас – козаків простих на все добре научаю, –

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І від вас-таки гріхів більш маю:

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І з отцем і з матушкою опрощенія не мав,

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І старшого брата стремінем в груди відпихав

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Либонь мене, козаки молодци, найбольш той гріх споткав.

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: За своєю гордощу шляпи не зняв.

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Мужикам і козакам на день добрий не давав...

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І либонь мене, козаки-молодци, найбольш той гріх спіткав

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Триста душ маленьких діток конем своїм добрим розбивав,

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А молодиї жінки за ворота вибігали

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І маленьки діти на руки хапали,

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І не єсть се, панове, мене по Чорному морю супротивна хвиля потопає

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І єсть се – мене отцевська та материнська молитва карає!

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Колиб мене отцевська та материна молитва од смерти боронила

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І на Чорному морю не втопила.

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Як буду я до отця до матері і до роду прибувати

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І буду я отця і матушку штити, шанувати, поважати»

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І як став Оликсій Попович по істиній правді гріхи Богу повідати

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Стала на Чорному морю супротивна хвиля утихати.

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І мов на Чорному морю не бувала;

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І всіх козаків до острова живцем прибивала,

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І всі козаки на остров виходили,

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Що на якому Чорному морю, на бистрій хвилі, на лихій хуртовині потопали

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І ніодного козака через Оликсія Поповича

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: На Чорному морі, на бистрій хвилі, на лихій хуртовині з-проміж себе не втеряли.

Text: І Олексій Попович на чердак вихожає

8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: «Слухайте, козакуи, панове-молодці, як святеє письмо висвічує.

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Той чоловік усегда на морі погибає,

song_id: 8.12_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І щастя і долі коло себе не має.

Text: Стала на Чорном морі велика хвиля утихати:

song_id: 8.16_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Ой про шо од нас гріхів більше маєшь?»

8.16_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Я святе письмо тричі на день читаю,

song_id: 8.16_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И всіх вас на все добре научаю,

song_id: 8.16_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Од вас я гріхів більше маю:

song_id: 8.16_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Гой, шо я ув охотне військо од’ізчав,

song_id: 8.16_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: З отцем, з матушкою опрощенія не мав,

song_id: 8.16_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: У груди отця й матушку стременом одпихав.

song_id: 8.16_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

8.16_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

song_id: 8.16_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.16_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.16_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.16_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Не єсть мене бистра хвиля потопляє,

song_id: 8.16_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Єсть мене отцевська и матчина молитва карає.

song_id: 8.16_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Гой, кода б мене отцевська й матчина молитва

8.16_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.16_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Як будемо до отця, до матушки, до роду прибувати,

song_id: 8.16_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

8.16_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

Text: А близьких сусід за родних братів вже мати»

8.16_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

8.16_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Возьмить мини чорною кытайкою самому очи завьяжите

song_id: 8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та билый каминь до шыи прычепите,

song_id: 8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та возьмите мене самого на Чорнее море пустите;

song_id: 8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Нехай я буду самъ своею головою на Чорному морі даруваты,

song_id: 8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А нижъ бильше вийська, товарыства сердешного, невынни души теряты.

song_id: 8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Я то, – каже, – братьця, съ Пырятына-города выижджавъ,

song_id: 8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Зъ отцемъ изъ маткою прощенія не прыймавь,

song_id: 8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Брата старшого за брата не мавъ,

song_id: 8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Блызькыхъ сусидъ зъ хлиба соли збавлявъ,

song_id: 8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та свого отця и матиръ стременамы въ груды поторкавъ

song_id: 8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И добримъ конемъ своимъ воронимъ по вулыци пробигавъ,

song_id: 8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Кровъ хрыстыяньську на сыру землю пролывавъ,

song_id: 8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Мимо церковьъ ихавъ, мимо святого Мыколая, шапкы не знимавъ,

song_id: 8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Лишь то я не свого коня вороного доброго молодецького поглядавъ,

song_id: 8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Колыбъ мини Богъ помигъ у добримъ здоровьи у сій потреби сходыты,

song_id: 8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То мигьбы я отцевьську й матчыну молытву ануваты й поважаты,

song_id: 8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И брата старшого за ридного отця въ себе маты,

song_id: 8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И чужыхъ маленькыхъ дитокъ на вулыцяхъ стричаты,

song_id: 8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І въ церковъ сьватую Мыколая шо-суботы, шо-недили молебни найматы».

song_id: 8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То якъ ставъ Олексій Поповычъ, Пырятыньськый писаръ військовый,

song_id: 8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И таману військовому, и товарыству сердешному

song_id: 8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Якъ бы николы й не грало;

song_id: 8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Ставъ зъ Дніпра тыхый витеръ повиваты,

song_id: 8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Стало козацьке 6 молодецьке судно до Буйнои Прыспы прыбуваты;

song_id: 8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Зъ Дунайського гырла вырвало, та до Буйнои Прыспи прыбыло.

song_id: 8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та тоди вси козакы на сыру землю схожалы,

song_id: 8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То вси козакы тоди дывомъ дывувалы,

song_id: 8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Що на якій то быстрій супротывній хвылі потопалы,

song_id: 8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та ни одного козака на втерялы.

song_id: 8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То тоди то Олексій Поповычъ на сыру землю схожае

song_id: 8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Шо то годитьця отцева матчына молытва!

song_id: 8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Шо хто отцеву и матчыну молытву спомынае,

song_id: 8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То отцева и матчына молытва изо дна моря душу выймае,

song_id: 8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Эй то годытьця отцева й матчына молытва чумакови въ чумацтви,

song_id: 8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.17_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
title: Олексій Поповичъ
Text: Ой то на Чорному мори, на камени биленькому,

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Шо на Чорному мори все недобре почынае,

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Бере судна козацьки-молодецьки на тры часты розбывае.

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А ще третя часть же ся має,

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А (ой) ше жъ пры той часты було козакивъ виська много,

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А ще пры той части був гатьманъ запорозькый,

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То винъ до козакивъ словамы промовляє,

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: «Одже жъ, козакы, панове-молодци, добре вы дбайте,

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И сповѣйдуйтесь напередъ мылосердному Богу и Чорному морю,

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То винъ до козакивъ словами промовляє,

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І мене самого на Чорне море пустите,

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Нехай же я Чорне море самъ своєю головою буду даруваты,

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: «Шо якъ же ты найбольше на соби гриховъ маєшъ,

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Шо ты берешъ у рукы Святи кныгы чытаєшъ,

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: У насъ простыхъ козаковъ на все харашо научаєшъ?»

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И васъ (простихъ) козакивъ простыхъ харашо научаю,

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А я єсть самъ усе недобреє злоє почынаю.

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Як я зъ города, зъ Переятына увъ охотне висько одъижджавъ,

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Я зъ отцемъ, зъ матушкою прощенія не прыймавъ,

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: На старшого брата велыкый гнивъ покладавъ,

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А блызькымъ сусидамъ неповынено хлиба-солы збавлявъ,

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Старшу сестру стременомъ одпыхавъ, прощеныя не дававъ,

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А ще по вулыци добрымъ конемъ воронымъ гулявъ,

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А ще ихавъ мымо Святую Церковь Святого Мыколая,

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Шапкы не здыймавъ, на себе хреста не складавъ,

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То може мене Господь мылостывый найбольше скаравъ.

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То вже жъ (одже жъ), козакы, панове-молодци,

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Не єсть мене на Чорному мори сопротывна хвыля потопає,

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А єсть мене отцевьська-матерына молытва крѣпко побывае.

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Когда бъ же мини Господь поблагословивъ

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: У сій потреби въ добримъ здоровьи сходжаты,

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Могъ бы я свого отца-матушку повыдаты,

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Старшого брата за родного отца въ себе маты,

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А блыжнихъ сусидъ за родное браття поважаты,

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А за старшу сестру по манастыряхъ молебни повсегда отправляты».

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Якъ ставъ Олексій Поповичъ свои грихы мылоседному Богу по правди повьидаты...

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Стала на Чорному мори супротывна хвыля вниматы

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То такъ уже жъ на Чорному мори супротывна хвыля внимала,

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Якъ никогда жъ вона не бувала.

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Бере судна козацьки молодецьки уси часты до Буйнои прыстани до берега прыставляла

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Отогды жъ козакы уси дывомъ здывувалы,

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: На якій то мы быстрій хуртовыни на лыхій хвыли потопалы

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та ни одного козака мыждо виська неповыне мы не втырялы.

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То отогда жъ Олексій Поповычъ на чуда выхождає,

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Бере въ рукы святи кныгы чытае,

8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Шо который чоловикъ отцевську матерыну молытву штыть, шанує, поважае,

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То отцевська матерына молытва отъ гриховъ одкупляє,

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

song_id: 8.18_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

song_id: 8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А в третій часьти було війська багато

song_id: 8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И до свойыхъ козакивъ словамы промовляйе:

song_id: 8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Уси козаки, хлопьци, добри молодьци замовчалы,

song_id: 8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И до свойыхъ козакивъ словамы промовляйе:

song_id: 8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Возьмите мини каминь до шыйи привьяжите,

song_id: 8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Нехай я буду въ мори самъ потопаты,

song_id: 8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Анижъ козацького війська запорожецького много теряты.

song_id: 8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Шо я-то, - каже, - братьця, съ Переятына-города одьйижджавъ,

song_id: 8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Зъ отцемъ, изъ маткою не прощався

song_id: 8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І старшого брата за брата не почытавъ,

song_id: 8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І меньшу сестрыцю стременомъ у груды одпыхавъ,

song_id: 8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Побыля сорока церковъ йыхавъ – шапкы не зьнимавъ,

song_id: 8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Черезъ села йыхавъ, маненькыхъ дитокъ топтавъ»,

song_id: 8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Се ж мене не быстрая хвыля потопляє,

song_id: 8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Це мене отцева молытва матусына погубляє».

song_id: 8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Якъ отцеву молытву матусыну ставъ чытаты,

song_id: 8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Хоть бы никалы й не грало.

song_id: 8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Шо съ козакивъ ни одного не втерялы.

song_id: 8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.19_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
title: Про Олексія поповича
Text: Ой на Чорному мори, а на камені биленькому

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И на Чорне море все пылно поглядайе,

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Шо шьчо то жъ на Чорному мори все недобре почынайе:

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Судна молодецькійи-козацькійи на тры часты розбывайе,

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Ой що перву часьть ухватыло – одбыло,

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: На быстрій хвыли, на лыхій хуртовыни потопайе.

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А пры тій же часьти було війська много,

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И важкий каминь до шыйи привьяжите,

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И за всихъ мене у Чорне море й пусьтите,

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та буду я свойею головою все Чорне море даруваты,

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Чимъ маю безневынныхъ козакивъ на Чорному морі погубляты».

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И вси заплакалы и словамы промовлялы:

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Шо ты ж те сьвяте пысьмо по трычи на день читайешь

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И насъ, простыхъ козакивъ на все добре научайешъ,

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А про шьчо ты грихивъ найбильше та майешъ?»

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То то Олексій Поповычъ це зачувайе,

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И з отцемъ изъ матирью попрощенія не мавъ,

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та за мною отець-маты за ворота вибігали,

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: В мене прощенія прохали та благалы,

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та я зъ нымы прощення знемогавъ,

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То, можеть, мене козакы панове-молодьци найбильше той грихъиспиткавъ.

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А й шце по вульщи свойимъ быстрымъ конемъ молодецькымъ пробигавъ,

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та по трыста малыхъ дитей побывавъ,

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То молодійи жены за ворота вибигалы,

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А ище мымо сорок церковъ пробигавъ,

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та на лицце хрыстыяньське хреста не складав.

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Не єсьть це мене быстра хвыля потопайе,

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А єсьть мене отцивська-материна молытва на Чорному мори карайе.

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Колы бъ же мене отцивська-материна молытва одъ смерти обороныла,

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Тоди я буду до роду прибуваты,

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Ридного брата за ридного отця почытаты,

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А ридну сестру за ридну матир уважаты,

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А близькыхъ сусидъ за ридныхъ братывъ почитаты.

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То ставъ Олексій Поповичъ по ыстыній правди грихы Богу сповидаты,

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То стала зла-супротывна хвыля на Чорному мори прытыхаты

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Якъ-будьто на Чорному мори того й не бувало,

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И всихъ козакивъ на суху путь прыбывало.

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: На якій мы лыхій хуртовыни потопалы,

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Даже и одного междо війська мы козака не втерялы».

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И той Олексій Поповычъ на суху путь выхожайе,

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Бере сьвате пысьмо у руки, чытає

song_id: 8.20_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

Text: Шо на Чорному мори все не добре починае,

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Шо изъ нызу, изъ Чорного моря буйный витеръ повивае,

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Посередъ Чорного моря быстра хвыля, лыха хуртовына уставае

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И вси судна козацьки-молодецьки бере, на тры части розбывае.

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А третяя часть де ся мае –

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А при той части було війска много,

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Бувъ гатьманъ, кошовый атаманъ Грыцько Коломычій,

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Шо по всему війську борзо оклыче:

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Што который козакъ на соби найбольше гриховъ мае,

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То сповидаюся я напередь мылосердному Богу,

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То прошу я васъ добре вы учините,

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То мени самому билый каминь на шею прычепите

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И мене самого на Чорне море пустите,

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То нехай же я буду самъ на Чорному мори потопаты,

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Своєю козацькою головою Чорне море дароваты,

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Анижъ я маю козаковъ зъ-межи війска безневинно теряты.

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Што я въ городи Пырыятыни въ охотне війско поступавъ,

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Зъ отцемь, зъ маткою прощеныя не воспрынимавъ,

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И на старшого брата велыкый гнивъ покладавъ

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И блызькимъ сусидамъ хлиба и соли позбавлявъ,

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Мымо церковъ йхав, мымо Святого Мыколая,

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Чесній громади на день добрый не сказавъ.

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Не есть же насъ посередъ Чорному мори быстра хвыля потопае,

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Есть же насъ отцевська та матчына молытва посередъ Чорного моря карае.

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: До роду, до отця, до матушки прыбуваты,

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Могъ бы я своего отця и матушку поважаты,

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Старшого брата за родного отця почытаты,

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И блызькых сусидивъ за родное браття у себе маты!..»

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То якъ ставъ Олексій Поповычъ пырятыньскый

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Богу грихы свои по правди повидаты

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То тогда стала на Чорному мори бистра хвиля и лиха хурговына прытыхаты.

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Сталы вси судна козацьки-молодецьки до прыстани прывертаты (прыбуваты).

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То тоди вси козакы на чудо выхожалы,

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Шо на какой то быстрій хвыли, лыхій хуртовыни потопалы

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та ни одного козака зъ межи війска не втерялы.

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То тогды Олексій Поповичъ козакъ лейстровый и пысарь війсковый

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Бере святе письмо въ рукы чытае:

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Всимъ козакамъ на всякое моленіе показуе:

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Што который козакъ отцевьську матерыну молитву спомынае,

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Отцевська та матерына молытва зо дна моря вынимае,

song_id: 8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.23_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
title: Олексій Поповичъ

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: На Чорному морі та на камені біленькому,

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А на Чорне море спильна поглядає,

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Шо на Чорному морі усе не добре починае:

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Береть судно козацьке – молодецькее на три часті розбивае;

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Одну часть узяло у орабську землю занесло,

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А другу часть ухватило у Дунайське гирло забило.

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А третяя часть – де ся має? –

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Посеред Чорного моря на бистрій хвилі потопае...

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А при той часті був гетьманъ кошовий, –

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: «Ой, вы, сотники и полковники и козаки рядовиі

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Сповідайтеся, братця, и къ Чорному морю,

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И напередъ Богу милосердному и отоману кошовому:

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Котрый на собі найбільше гріхівъ мае!»

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То всі сотники, усі полковники замовчали,

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Тільки озывается Олексій Поповичъ Пирятинській, писаръ війсковий и козакъ лейстровий,

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То вінъ на чердакъ исхожае, словамы промовляе:

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: «Ой, вы, сотники, вы и полковники и козаки рядовиі,

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То добре вы собі учиніте, возміть мене, чорною китайкою очи завьяжите,

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та білий камінь до шиі причепите,

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та візьміть мене самого на Чорне море пустите.

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Нехай я буду на Чорному морі своєю головою даруовати,

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Ажъ не товариства сердешного невинноі душі теряти!

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Я то, каже, братця, зъ города Пирятина виізжавъ,

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Изъ отцемъ, изъ матірью прощенія не ймавъ,

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Свого отця и матіръ въ груди поторкавъ,

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И близькихъ сусідівъ зъ хліба и соли збавлявъ,

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Свого старшого брата за брата не мавъ,

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И кровь христіянську на сыру землю проливавъ;

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А мимо церковь їхавъ, мимо святого Миколи, –

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А лишъ бы то я на свого доброго коня поглядавъ,

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та на свое здоровьє козацьке-молодецьке уповавъ.

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Коли-бъ то мені Богъ помігъ у добромъ здоровьи у сіеі потребі сходити,

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То могъ бы я отцеву й материну молитву рано й пізно споминати!»

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То якъ ставъ Олексій Поповичъ своі гріхи милосердному Богу і Чорному

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: морю і отаману кошовому по правді повідати,

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Ставъ изъ Дніпра тихий вітер повивати,

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Стало судно козацьке-мролодецьке до буйноі Приспи прибувати.

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То одну часть взяло – зъ орапськой землі вынесло,

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А другую часть исхватило – изъ Дунайського горла вырвало,

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То всі козаки на сыру землю зхожали,

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Къ сирій землі низкі поклоны ударяли;

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А Олексій Поповичъ Пирятинській на сыру землю схожае, –

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Береть у руки святое письмо читае,

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: о сотниківъ до полковниківъ словами промовляе:

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Отъ тимъ-то, каже, братця, годится отцева й материна молитва!

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Хто отцеву і материну молитву споминае,

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То отцева і материна молитва и помощь спомагае,

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І одъ гріхівъ одъ смертельнихъ іскупляе!..»

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То всі сотники и полковники теє зачували,

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: «Одъже, Олексію Поповичу, хотя ты берешъ въ руки святе письмо, читаєшъ

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А лишъ-бы то ты більше гріхівъ на собі маешъ?!..»

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та тоді воны на сырій землі проживали,

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Сами помі жду собою дивомъ дивували:

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: «Шо на якій – то бистрій филі на Чорнімъ морі мы пробували,

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та не одного козака не втеряли!

song_id: 8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.24_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

title: Олексій Попович
Text: Гой! Како на Чорному морі, на білому камені

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Шо на Чорному морі злая потуга-хвиля вставала,

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Всі судни козацькі на три части розбивала:

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Третєє судно при злой, при лихой годині

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Не когда не кого не бувало

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: От тогда ж та вони всі замовчали,

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Отада ж то вони всі замовчали,

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Прошу ж я вас добре дбайте,

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Візьміть же ви мене Олексія Поповича одного,

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А ще не стріляйте не рубайте,

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Тольки так у Чорне море живцем умітайте,

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Дек я ж бо то із отцевського двора з’їзжав,

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Із отцем і з матер’ю сердешною прощенія не мав,

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То Бог святи(й) знає, Бог святи(й) відає,

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: За что нас Господь на морі карає.

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А ще старшую сестру на воротях стрекав

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То Бог святи знає, Бог святи відає,

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: За що на Господі на морі карає.

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А ще старого чоловіка на дороги стрекал

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І на добрий день йому не давав,

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То Бог святи знає, Бог святи відає,

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: За що нас Господь на морі карає.

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А ще против Спаса, проти Ображенія їхав,

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І отцевої молитви і матері не споминав,

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То Бог святи знає, Бог святи відає,

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: За що нас Господь на морі карає.

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А ще коли під собою дороги мав

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Кров їх християнську на сиу землю проливав.

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Отож да ж то отцй да матки до Бога руки вздимали,

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То Бог святи знає, Бог святи відає,

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: За що нас Господь на морі карає.

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А я ж бо то, Олексій Попович, мед да кавитую горілку подпивав

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То Бог святи знає, Бог відає,

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: За що нас Господь на морі карає».

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Отода ж то взяли його не стріляли, не рубали

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І в Чорне море живим не метали,

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І чорним оксамитом йому очі покрили,

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А ще не стрелили, не рубали,

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Да кров його християнську в Чорне море впущали.

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: О тода ж то як стало в собі море

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То годі ж воно вже губити всі судни козацькі,

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Наче ж бо руками ж їх поприносило.

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Вот тода ж то Олексій Попович по берегу похождає,

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: За сльозами писанія Господнього не видає

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: «Ей, козаки ж, каже, ви друзі-молодци, прошу я вас добре дбайте,

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Да будете всім своїх живих отців да маток заставати.

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А Боже письмо святоє добре світить-просвічає,

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Хто отцевої молитви не вштить, не поважає,

song_id: 8.25_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Оце вам молитва материна лібо на морі, лібо на землі скарає».
