title: Объ Алексіи Поповиче

song_id: 8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Шо на Чорному морю все недобре починае,

song_id: 8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Судна козацкийи, молодецькийи на три часты розбывае.

song_id: 8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Другу часть ухопыло, у Дунайскы гырло забыло,

song_id: 8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Пры той часты було выйска много,

song_id: 8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Ддобре вы дбайте, гриховъ не тайте,

song_id: 8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И Черному морю, и атаману кошовому».

song_id: 8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: До моей шийи биленькый важкый камень прывяжите.

song_id: 8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Самого мене у Чорное море и спустите.

song_id: 8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Нехай же я буду самъ съ свойею головою

song_id: 8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Нижели я маю много душъ християнськихъ

song_id: 8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Ты же святеє письмо по трычи на день читаешъ

song_id: 8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А протее таки жъ отъ насъ грихивъ бильше маешъ.

song_id: 8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Я святое письмо по тричи на день чытаю

song_id: 8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Отъ васъ таки грихивъ бильше маю.

song_id: 8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То я въ охотнее вийсько одйизжавъ,

song_id: 8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И зъ отцемъ, и зъ матерью прощенья не мавъ,

song_id: 8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Старшого брата за брата не мавъ,

song_id: 8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Свойимъ добрымъ козацькымъ молодецькымь конемъ розбывавъ,

song_id: 8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И на себе хреста не складавъ

song_id: 8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И отцевской и материнской молытвы не вспомынавъ.

song_id: 8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: За своєю гордынею шляпы не здиймавъ,

song_id: 8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Мужыкам-козакамъ на день добрый не дававъ.

song_id: 8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: «Ой не єсть це мене Чорне море потопляе,

song_id: 8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А есть це мене отцевська и матерына молытва карае.

song_id: 8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Ой, когда бъ мени отцевська-матерына молытва отъ смерти убороныла,

song_id: 8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Как буду я до отца, до матери пребуваты.

song_id: 8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И буду я отца и матерь штыты, шануваты и поважаты.

song_id: 8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И (сатшого) брата могъ бы я за родного отца почытаты,

song_id: 8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И блызькыхъ сусыдъ за родные братие себе уже маты».

song_id: 8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: По истыний правди грихъ Богу повыдаты,

song_id: 8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Заразъ стала зла супротывна хвилешна хвиля на Черному морю притыхаты.

song_id: 8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Мовъ на Чорному морю ыне бувала.

song_id: 8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.27_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

song_id: 8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І в Чорне море за всіх мене іспустіте:

song_id: 8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Нехай я буду сам своєю головою

Text: Ніжлі я (маю) много душ по Чорному морю

8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: «Олексію Поповичу, ти славний писарю і лицарю!

song_id: 8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

song_id: 8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І нас, простих козаків, на все добре научаєш,

song_id: 8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А про що ти від нас гріхів найбільше маєш,

song_id: 8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Що ти сам себе на Чорному морі зо всіх погубляєш?»

song_id: 8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: З отцем і з матушкою по прощенію я не мав.

song_id: 8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: За мною отець і матушка за ворота виходжали,

song_id: 8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: У мене прощенія прохали і благали,

song_id: 8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Я недобре починав: рідного отця і мать

8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А іще мимо сорок церков пробігав,

song_id: 8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: На лицю християнському хреста я не складав,

song_id: 8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І отцовської-матчиної молитви я не споминав,

song_id: 8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А іще своїм добрим конем пробігав,

song_id: 8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Триста душ малих дітей конем побивав

song_id: 8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То молодиї жени за ворота вибігали

song_id: 8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І малих діток на руки хватали,

song_id: 8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То не єсть мене Чорне море потопляє,

song_id: 8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Єсть мене отцовська і матчина молитва

song_id: 8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Коли б мене отцовська та матчина молитва

song_id: 8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То буду я до отця, до матушки,

song_id: 8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Міг би я старшого брата за рідного отця почитати

8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Став Олексій Попович по істинній правді

song_id: 8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І всі козаки на сухопуття виходжали

8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: «Ех, на якій-то, братці, були бистрій хвилі

song_id: 8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Даже ні одного козака з війська ми

8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То Олексій Попович на сухопуття виходжає,

song_id: 8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Бере святе письмо, п тричі на день читає.

song_id: 8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: В полі і в домі щастям-долею помагає.

song_id: 8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: У купестві і ремеслі на помощ помагає».

song_id: 8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.29_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Всему миру на здравіє, на многая лєта.

title: Алексѣій Попович, казак запорозький

8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Все спыльно на Чорне море прогледае,

song_id: 8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Що не добрее на моры почынае:

song_id: 8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А трейтяя часть по морю, як сонце, маеть,

song_id: 8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Хто зъ васъ велыкый грихъ мае, повидайте,

song_id: 8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: «Копитанъ казацькій, ныхто зъ насъ гриха велыкого не має».

song_id: 8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И съ йихней шайки Алексѣй-казакъ выступае,

song_id: 8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: У Чорнее море одного мине испустите;

song_id: 8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: 30. Пусть я одынъ буду морскую глыбыну изнуряты,

song_id: 8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Но не всѣ козаки черезъ мене будуть погибаты».

song_id: 8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: «Есть ты, Алексѣй Поповычъ, якый ты за собою велыкый грихъ маєшъ

song_id: 8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Ты жъ святее письмо на день трейчы чытаешъ,

song_id: 8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та все козаковъ-хлопцевъ на добрее научаешъ;

song_id: 8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То якый тебе велыкый грихъ карае,

song_id: 8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Шо въ Чернее море корабель затопляе?»

song_id: 8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Когда я зъ двора въ козацькую бытву выйижджавъ,

song_id: 8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Оця й матеръ стременамы въ груди сувавъ;

song_id: 8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А ще за собою велыкій грихъ маю:

song_id: 8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Когда я по вулыци на доброй лошади пройижджавъ,

song_id: 8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То за мною молодыйи жены выхождалы,

song_id: 8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Шобъ тебе, Алексѣй Поповичъ, перва пуля не мынула».

song_id: 8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А ище за собою я грихъ маю:

song_id: 8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И хресного знамя на себе не клавъ.

song_id: 8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А ище за собою грихъ маю:

song_id: 8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Наверно, мене и сей грихъ карае –

song_id: 8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Такъ Олексѣй Поповичъ грихи свойи сознавався;

song_id: 8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Такъ на мори тихая погода становылась,

song_id: 8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Такъ якъ ничево на мори не бувало,

song_id: 8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Все тыхее море и вольнее стало;

song_id: 8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Попутный вѣтеръ ставъ у корабель подуваты,

song_id: 8.30_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И ставъ нашъ корабель козацькый икъ острову прыбуваты.

8.31_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

Text: За своєю гордостю шапки не скидав,

Text: На Чорному морі, та на камені білому,

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Він смутно себе має і на Чорне море

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Що на чорному морі все недобре починає,

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Що на небі всі звізди потмарило,

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Половина місяця у чорну хмару заступило.

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А із низу буйний вітер повіває

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А на Чорному морі злая хуртовина і бистрая хвиля наступає,

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А другу часть судна гирло дунайськеє пожерло,

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А третя часть судна, де саме Чорнеє море, там потопає.

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А при тій части був Грицько Зборовський,

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То він то про міждо козаками прохождає

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та Чорному морю та й мені, отаману кошовому,

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Бо вони на собі великого гріха не мали.

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: «Добре ви, братця, зробіте, мене самого возміте,

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та самого мене одного в море зіпхніте,

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Нехай я буду у чорному морі сам один потопати,

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Що б козацького війська запорізького всього незгубляти.»

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То тоді ж козаки все це зачували

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та до Олексія Поповича словами промовляли:

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: «Ти ж, було, Олексію Поповичу на день тричі святе письмо у руки береш та й читаїш

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Тай нас, козаків простих, на все добре навчаєш

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А чого ж ти білше від нас на собі гріха маєш?»

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Тоді Олексій Попович став до козаків словами промовляти

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І тричі подень святе пісьмо у руки беру та читаю

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та вас, козаків, на все добре навчаю,

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То тим же я більше від вас на собі гріха маю.

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Як я з города Пириятина виїзджав

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То я від отця й від матусі прощенія непрохав

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І отця й матусі не почитав і неповажав,

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А на старшого брата гнів великий покладав,

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Сусіду ближню безвинно хлібом і сілью оставляв,

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та ще і на свого доброго коня сідав,

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А старих людей стременами в груди штовхав.

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та іще проти церкви, Божого дому проїзджав

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Шапки з себе не скидав і христа на себе не покладав,

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та іще їхав селами й городами,

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То старі люди стояли, вони думали та гадали,

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То може вони що й добре проти мене сказали,

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А я против їх своєю гордостию та пишностию

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Я не питався старих людей - яка в вас у селенії церква святая,

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А питався старих людей – де у вас корчма новая,

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Що другі козаки у святу неділеньку у Божім домі молебні наймали,

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А ми тоді в корчмі пили та гуляли

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та музики наймали та танці справляли

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: О тим то я, козаки молодці,

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Більше від вас на собі гріха маю.

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Тепер я сам погибаю, на Чорному морі потопаю,

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Цеж бо козаки панове на Чорному морі

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А це мене отцева та матусина молитва карає.

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Колиб мене цяя злая хуртовина і бистрая хвиля

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Тоді б я знав, як отця й матусю почитати й поважати,

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Старшого брата за рідного оця считати,

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А рідну сестрицю за матусю в себе мати».

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Тоді ж козаки запорожці усе добре дбали

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та Олексієві Поповичу назад руки з’язали,

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та все такого козака у Чорноє море пускати пожаліли

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та на правій руці палець мезиний Олексієві відрубали

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та в Чорнеє море кров Олексієву пуськали.

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Коли Чорне море стало христіянськую кров заживати,

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То тоді на Чорному морі злая хуртовина

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Як руками підоймати до Тендрева-острова прибивати.

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Тоді ж ті козаки у судні стали дивом дивувати:

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: На Чорному морі та на бистрій хвилі потопали,

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Ані одного козака з межі військової (?) не втеряли.»

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То Олексій Попович став із судна на пристань вихожати

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та святе письмо брати та й читати,

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та всіх козаків на все добре научати:

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: «Треба козаки-панове отця й матусю почитати й поважати,

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То той собі навік счастя має,

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: На полі та на морі отцева матусина молитва на поміч призиває»

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То Олексію Поповичу Пириятинському слава од нині до віка

song_id: 8.34_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А вам пошли, Боже, на здравіє та на многая літа.

song_id: 8.35_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
title: Про Олексія Поповича

song_id: 8.35_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.35_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А там сидів ясний сокіл білозерець.

song_id: 8.35_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.35_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.35_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.35_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.35_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.35_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Що на небі всі звізди потьмарило,

song_id: 8.35_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.35_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.35_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Та із низу та буйний вітер повіває,

song_id: 8.35_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.35_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.35_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.36_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
title: Про Олексїя Поповича

song_id: 8.36_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.36_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.36_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.36_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.36_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Що на Чорному морі все не добре починає:

song_id: 8.36_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.36_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.36_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.36_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.36_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.36_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.36_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.36_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Третя часть де ся має, має?

song_id: 8.36_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.36_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То при тій частинї було війська богато,

song_id: 8.36_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.36_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.36_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
title: Олексій Попович
Text: Гей, на чорному морі, на камені біленькому

song_id: 8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Там седів сокіл ясненькій, жалібненько хвилить-прохвиляє

song_id: 8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І на Чорнеє море спилна поглядає.

song_id: 8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Гей, що на чорнім морі все недобре починає:

song_id: 8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Судна козацькі-молодецькі на три части розбиває.

song_id: 8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А третя де самая – посеред Чорного моря

song_id: 8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: На бистрій хвилі на лихій хуртовині потопає.

song_id: 8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І що при тій части було війська много

song_id: 8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Грицько Коломійченко, по всьому війську зборже окличе:

song_id: 8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Добре ви дбайте, на Чорнім морі гріхів не тайте,

song_id: 8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І Чорному морю і міні, отаману кошовому».

song_id: 8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То козаки теє зачували і всі замовчали,

song_id: 8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Тілки обізвется Олексій Попович, Гетьман Запорожець:

song_id: 8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: До моєї шиї біленький камінь привьяжіте

song_id: 8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І очі мої козацькі-молодецькії китайкою запніте,

song_id: 8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І возміть мене самого у Чорне море спустіте,

song_id: 8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Нехай буду я сам своєю головою

song_id: 8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Ніж я маю козацьке-христіянське військо по Чорному морю погубляти».

song_id: 8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: «Гей, Олексію Поповичу, славний Лицарю і Писарю!

song_id: 8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Ти ж по тричі на день святеє пісьмо читаєш

song_id: 8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І нас простих козаків на все добре навчаєш,

song_id: 8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А прощо-ж ти од нас гріхів білше маєш?»

song_id: 8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Що я по тричі на день і святеє пісьмо читаю

song_id: 8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: І вас простих козаків на все добре научаю,

song_id: 8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А я од вас гріхів білше маю,

song_id: 8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Що я у неділю до схід сонця

song_id: 8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Вино і мед і горілку попивав,

song_id: 8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Старшого брата я забрата не мав,

song_id: 8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Старшую сестру із баржей не уважав,

song_id: 8.37_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

song_id: 9.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То од отця, од матки прощення не приймали,

Text: Да й старую матусю ми од себе а й стременами одпихали;

song_id: 9.4_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То то же ми собі превелику гордость мали:

Text: То же ми собі превелику гордость мали:

title: Атаманъ Матяшъ старый

song_id: 10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Що подъ собой гостей великихъ имѣли:

song_id: 10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Межъ ними былъ атаманъ Матяшъ старенькій.

song_id: 10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Стали по чистому полю кони козацкіе пускати,

song_id: 10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Стали козацкіе седла отъ себе далеко откидати,

song_id: 10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Стали козацкіе семипядые пищали по-за кустами ховати.

song_id: 10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Козацкихъ коней изъ препона не пущайте,

song_id: 10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Тогда козаки съ атамана Матяша насмѣхали:

song_id: 10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: "Десь ты, атамане Матяшу старенькій, межъ козаками не бывалъ,

song_id: 10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Десь ты козацкои каши не ѣдаль,

song_id: 10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Десь ты козацкихъ звычаевъ не зналъ,

song_id: 10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Що ты намъ, козакамъ-бравославцамъ, великій страхъ задалъ".

song_id: 10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Тогда атаманъ Матяшъ нихъ далеко отступалъ,

song_id: 10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: То саме въ ночи зождавъ малую годинку, невелику часинку,

song_id: 10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Якъ турки-янычары съ чистаго поля въ долину припали,

song_id: 10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Дванадцять козаковъ бравославцевъ-небывальцевъ въ полонъ забрали,

song_id: 10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Атаманъ Матяшъ старенькій на добраго коня сѣдаетъ,

song_id: 10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Сребро и злото турецкое отъ нихъ забирали,

song_id: 10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Въ городѣ Сѣчи безпечно себе мали,

song_id: 10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Серебро и золото турецкое между собою раздѣляли,

song_id: 10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: За атамана Матяша Господа Бога прохали:

song_id: 10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Що ти въ чистомъ поле побувавъ,

song_id: 10.1_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Изъ насъ, бравославцевъ-небывальцовъ, ни одного козака изъ войска не утерялъ".

10.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

song_id: 10.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И тилькы не згорилы тры терны дрибненьки

song_id: 10.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

10.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Вы коней изъ арканивъ не спускайте

song_id: 10.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: Ы сидла свойи въ головы пидкладайте.

Text: "Десь ты, каже, диду Матяшъ, мисъ козаками не бував

Text: Шо ты намъ козакамъ такого страху велыкого задавъ".

10.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

song_id: 10.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: А ти молоди козакы кони поспускалы пасты,

song_id: 10.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
10.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

song_id: 10.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
10.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
10.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

Text: И дванадцять козакивъ-православцивъ у полон забралы

song_id: 10.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

10.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И до свойыхъ козакивъ словамы промовлявъ:

10.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

song_id: 10.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
10.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

10.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period

song_id: 10.2_Dmytrenko, Dovzhenok, Hrytsa_2009_Thoughts of the early Cossack period
Text: И ни одного козака нашого не втерявъ,
